Released before the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], '''''Wild Space on 50 Credits a Day''''' was a travel guide detailing various localities in the area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. The travel guide contained an entry on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the pleasure seeking [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known for their constant partying.

==Description==
''Wild Space on 50 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Credits]] a Day'' was a travel guide and non-fiction reference literature released sometime prior to the completion of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="One of a Kind" /> which concluded in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> The travel guide focused on navigating the reader through [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="One of a Kind" />—an area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that remained partially unexplored and widely untamed<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|336|Wild Space}}</ref>—while only spending fifty credits per day. ''Wild Space on 50 Credits a Day'' had an number of entries on a variety of locations in Wild Space, including an entry on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]], which garnered the moniker "party planet" because it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known for their constant carefree, insouciant lifestyle. The entry on Zeltros noted that if the reader was not enjoying their [[Time/Legends|time]] on Zeltros, then the Zeltrons will try to improve the reader's disposition.<ref name="One of a Kind" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Wild Space on 50 Credits a Day''{{'s}} only mention in [[Star Wars]] [[canon]] was in [[One of a Kind (comic story)|''One of a Kind'']]—an eighteen-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 8]] and published on [[June 20]], [[2007]]— where the travel guide is quoted multiple times over the course of the comic's story.
